activities_projects.title: Understanding Marginalised Groups
steps: Write the names of two marginalised groups mentioned in the chapter
Explain the problems faced by each group
Discuss why support and protection are needed
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the challenges faced by marginalised communities

activities_projects.title: Fundamental Rights and Equality
activities_projects.objective: Understand how Fundamental Rights protect people
steps: Write two Fundamental Rights that help protect equality
Explain them in simple words
Give one example of how these rights help marginalised groups
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Recognises the role of rights in protecting equality

activities_projects.title: Role of the Government
activities_projects.objective: Understand how the government helps marginalised groups
steps: Write two actions taken by the government to support marginalised communities
Explain why these actions are necessary
Discuss with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands government responsibility in reducing marginalisation

activities_projects.title: Case Study: Discrimination
steps: Write a situation where a person faces discrimination
Explain why the situation is unfair
Suggest how laws or rights could solve the problem
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands how laws help address discrimination

activities_projects.title: Equality Poster
activities_projects.objective: Promote equality and respect in society
steps: Create a poster promoting equality and justice
Include a slogan related to equal rights
Explain the message of your poster

activities_projects.title: Legal Safeguards List
activities_projects.objective: Learn about laws that protect marginalised groups
steps: Write one law that protects marginalised communities
Explain how it protects people
Give an example of its use

activities_projects.title: Short Essay on Equality
activities_projects.objective: Explain the importance of equality in society
steps: Write a short paragraph on why equality is important
Explain how it helps marginalised communities
Give one example from society
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Explains the role of equality in reducing marginalisation

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary of the Chapter
activities_projects.objective: Learn key terms related to marginalisation
steps: Write words like discrimination, equality, rights, justice
Write their meanings
Use one word in a sentence

activities_projects.title: Discussion: Respecting Diversity
steps: Discuss why respecting different communities is important
Write two points from the discussion
Explain how respect can reduce marginalisation

activities_projects.title: Real-Life Observation
steps: Observe one example where people help disadvantaged groups
Write what you observed
Explain how it supports equality and fairness
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Connects civic concepts with real-life situations
